query:
-- Fix the 2 UCXcel Essential services with clearly wrong costs ($255 and $60 are per-seat costs that are way too high)
-- UCXcel Essential buy price from Access4 pricebook is $9.00/seat
-- The $255 one is likely a bundle (20 seats × $9 = $180 or similar) - flag for review
-- The $60 one is likely wrong - flag for review

-- Fix UCXcel Essential at $255 - this is suspicious, flag it
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] UCXcel Essential at $255/month is unusually high - expected $9/seat. Please verify this is not a bundle or data entry error.')
WHERE planName = 'UCXcel Essential' AND monthlyCost = 255.00;

-- Fix UCXcel Essential at $60 - also suspicious
UPDATE services
SET discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [COST REVIEW NEEDED] UCXcel Essential at $60/month is unusually high - expected $9/seat. Please verify.')
WHERE planName = 'UCXcel Essential' AND monthlyCost = 60.00;

-- Fix Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex at $0 cost - this should have a cost
-- From pricebook, Webex add-on is typically $3-7/seat
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 3.00,
    discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), ' | [PRICEBOOK FIX] Softphone/Webex add-on cost set to $3.00/month - please verify against Access4 pricebook')
WHERE planName = 'Softphone add-on with Cisco Webex' AND monthlyCost = 0.00;

-- Check overall summary of what was fixed
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalServices,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 7.20 AND LOWER(planName) LIKE '%fax%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as efaxFixed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 13.80 AND LOWER(planName) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ucxcelBasicCorrect,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zeroCostServices,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost = 49.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as remainingPlaceholders
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute
